Introducing /orchestrate, a skill that recursively spawns agents to tackle your most ambitious tasks with the Cursor SDK.

We’ve used it to:
- Autoresearch our internal skills, cutting token use by 20% while improving evals
- Cut cold start times on our internal backend by 80% https://t.co/8Hm8S9J5pg
backup.summary: Cursor AI推出/orchestrate功能，可递归生成多个Agent完成复杂任务。已实现token使用减少20%、冷启动时间减少80%。开发者工具，受众垂直。
backup.verdict_note: 虽然受众垂直，但作为开发者工具新功能发布+具体数据指标，仍有一定价值。但不符合小红书账号定位。
